policy_name: Vendor Payment Policy - Momentos by Chris

validation_rules.notes: Minimum 25% of package value. No vendor contracts signed without client deposit in hand.
Verbal quotes don't count. Carmen, Mary, and DJ Mundo all use written contracts.
Needed for tax deductions. Costco and Party City receipts go in the accordion folder.
Good vendor relationships matter. Pay on time.
2021 Honda Odyssey. Track miles for IRS deduction. Spring Valley to venues adds up.

context: Internal payment and reimbursement guidelines for Momentos by Chris sole proprietorship.
